DOWNFALL-TRIGGERSKILLBONUS.title: Skill Bonus
DOWNFALL-TRIGGERSKILLBONUS.description: If you are in Stance, trigger its Skill Bonus.
DOWNFALL-PYRE.description: Requires exhausting a card in hand in addition to paying its energy cost.
DOWNFALL-PYRE.title: Pyre
DOWNFALL-GEM.description: Gems can be placed into [gold]Sockets[/gold] in cards at a Rest Site.
DOWNFALL-GEM.title: Gem
DOWNFALL-VOLATILE.title: Volatile
DOWNFALL-ADVANCE.description: Move to the next Ghostflame. Moving onto a Ghostflame [gold]Extinguishes[/gold] it.
DOWNFALL-ADVANCE.title: Advance
DOWNFALL-RETRACT.description: Move to the previous Ghostflame. Moving onto a Ghostflame [gold]Extinguishes[/gold] it.
DOWNFALL-RETRACT.title: Retract
DOWNFALL-AFTERLIFE.description: The purple effect will also trigger when this card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
DOWNFALL-AFTERLIFE.title: Afterlife
